scripts.db:migrate:rag: uv run --project services/ai alembic -c services/ai/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:seed: pnpm prepare:generated && pnpm --filter @rag/api exec prisma db seed
scripts.lint: pnpm prepare:generated && pnpm -r --if-present lint && uv run --project services/ai ruff check services/ai
scripts.typecheck: pnpm prepare:generated && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && uv run --project services/ai mypy services/ai/src
scripts.test: pnpm prepare:generated && pnpm -r --if-present test && pnpm --filter @rag/api test:e2e && uv run --project services/ai pytest services/ai/tests
scripts.build: pnpm prepare:generated && pnpm -r --if-present build && uv build --project services/ai
